data.name: InvalidInstitutionIDError
data.value: 提供的机构 ID 无效。

data.name: AccountNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的账户不存在。

data.name: UserDataRetrievalError
data.value: 检索用户数据时发生错误。

data.name: InvalidUserError
data.value: 提供的用户无效。

data.name: AssetNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的资产不存在。

data.name: AssetEditNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试编辑的资产不存在。

data.name: AssetDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试删除的资产不存在。

data.name: AssetRestoreNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试恢复的资产不存在。

data.name: AssetOrderNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试排序的资产不存在。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试更新的自动规则不存在。

data.name: AutomaticRuleDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试删除的自动规则不存在。

data.name: InvalidConditionError
data.value: 自动规则中的一个或多个条件无效。

data.name: RuleRunSummary
data.value: 规则已应用 {0} 项更新。

data.name: AutomaticRuleInvalidRegexError
data.value: 正则表达式模式 '{0}' 无效。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedOperatorForMerchantError
data.value: 商户字段不支持运算符 '{0}'。

data.name: AutomaticRuleCategoryDoesNotExistError
data.value: 类别 '{0}' 不存在。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedOperatorForCategoryError
data.value: 类别字段不支持运算符 '{0}'。

data.name: AutomaticRuleInvalidAmountError
data.value: 金额 '{0}' 不是有效的小数。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedOperatorForAmountError
data.value: 金额字段不支持运算符 '{0}'。

data.name: AutomaticRuleInvalidDateError
data.value: 日期 '{0}' 不是有效的日期。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedOperatorForDateError
data.value: 日期字段不支持运算符 '{0}'。

data.name: BalanceAccountCreateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试为其添加余额的账户不存在。

data.name: BalanceAccountNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的账户不存在。

data.name: BudgetCreateEmptyCategoryError
data.value: 您尝试创建的预算没有类别。

data.name: BudgetCreateDuplicateError
data.value: 类别为 '{0}'、日期为 '{1}' 的预算已存在。

data.name: BudgetCreateCompletedWithErrorsError
data.value: 预算创建完成，但有错误：{0}

data.name: BudgetUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试更新的预算不存在。

data.name: BudgetUpdateParentLimitError
data.value: 父预算不能小于其子预算的总和。

data.name: BudgetDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试删除的预算不存在。

data.name: GoalCreateMissingContributionOrDateError
data.value: 目标必须设置每月存入金额或目标日期。

data.name: GoalCreateInPastError
data.value: 目标的目标日期不能是过去的日期。

data.name: GoalCreateNoAccountsError
data.value: 目标必须关联至少一个账户。

data.name: GoalCreateInvalidAccountError
data.value: 您尝试使用的账户不存在。

data.name: GoalUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试更新的目标不存在。

data.name: GoalUpdatePastDateError
data.value: 目标的目标日期不能是过去的日期。

data.name: GoalUpdateNoMonthlyContributionError
data.value: 目标的每月存入金额必须大于 0。

data.name: GoalDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试删除的目标不存在。

data.name: GoalCompleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试完成的目标不存在。

data.name: GoalCompleteAlreadyCompletedError
data.value: 您尝试完成的目标已经完成。

data.name: InstitutionCreateDuplicateNameError
data.value: 具有此名称的机构已存在。

data.name: InstitutionNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的机构不存在。

data.name: InstitutionUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试更新的机构不存在。

data.name: InstitutionUpdateEmptyNameError
data.value: 机构名称不能为空。

data.value: 具有此名称的机构已存在。

data.name: InstitutionOrderNotFoundError

data.name: TransactionCategoryCreateDuplicateNameError
data.value: 具有此名称的交易类别已存在。

data.name: TransactionCategoryCreateEmptyNameError
data.value: 交易类别名称不能为空。

data.name: TransactionCategoryCreateSameNameAsParentError
data.value: 交易类别不能与其父类别同名。

data.name: TransactionCategoryCreateParentNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试使用的父交易类别不存在。

data.name: TransactionCategoryUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试更新的交易类别不存在。

data.name: TransactionCategoryUpdateEmptyNameError
data.value: 交易类别名称不能为空。

data.name: TransactionCategoryUpdateDuplicateNameError
data.value: 具有此名称的交易类别已存在。

data.name: TransactionCategoryUpdateSameNameAsParentError
data.value: 交易类别不能与其父类别同名。

data.name: TransactionCategoryUpdateParentNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试使用的父交易类别不存在。

data.name: TransactionCategoryDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试删除的交易类别不存在。

data.name: TransactionCreateAccountNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试向其添加交易的账户不存在。

data.name: TransactionNotFoundError

data.name: TransactionUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试更新的交易不存在。

data.name: TransactionDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试删除的交易不存在。

data.name: TransactionRestoreNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试恢复的交易不存在。

data.name: TransactionSplitNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试拆分的交易不存在。

data.name: TransactionSplitInvalidAmountError
data.value: 拆分金额必须小于交易金额。

data.name: TransactionImportAccountNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试向其添加交易的账户不存在。

data.name: UserSettingsNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的用户设置不存在。

data.name: InvalidCurrencyCodeError
data.value: 提供的货币代码无效。

data.name: InvalidLanguageCodeError
data.value: 提供的语言代码无效。

data.name: InvalidBudgetWarningThresholdError
data.value: 预算警告阈值必须在 0% 到 100% 之间。

data.name: InvalidForceSyncLookbackMonthsError
data.value: 强制同步回溯期必须在 0 到 12 个月之间。

data.name: ValueAssetNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试获取其数值的资产不存在。

data.name: ValueDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试删除的值不存在。

data.name: SimpleFinDataNotFoundError
data.value: 未找到 SimpleFIN 数据。

data.name: SimpleFinDataRetrievalError
data.value: 检索 SimpleFIN 数据时发生错误。

data.name: SimpleFinAccountNotFoundForTransactionError
data.value: 未找到与同步 ID '{0}' 的交易匹配的账户。

data.name: SimpleFinDecodeTokenError
data.value: 解码设置令牌时发生错误。

data.name: SimpleFinInvalidAccessTokenError
data.value: 提供的访问令牌无效。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedFieldError
data.value: 规则条件中的字段 '{0}' 不受支持。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedActionFieldError
data.value: 规则操作中的字段 '{0}' 不受支持。

data.name: AutomaticRuleCategoryNotFoundError
data.value: 类别 '{0}' 不存在。

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedOperatorError
data.value: 规则操作中的运算符 '{0}' 不受支持。

data.name: WidgetUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试更新的小组件不存在。

data.name: WidgetSettingsNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的小组件设置不存在。

data.name: WidgetConfigurationNullError
data.value: 小组件配置为空或未设置。

data.name: WidgetConfigurationDeserializationError
data.value: 解析小组件配置失败。

data.name: NetWorthWidgetLineNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的净资产小组件行不存在。

data.name: NetWorthWidgetGroupNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的净资产小组件组不存在。

data.name: NetWorthWidgetCategoryNotFoundError
data.value: 您尝试访问的净资产小组件类别不存在。

data.name: NetWorthWidgetCategoryTargetLineDependsOnThisLineError
data.value: 无法创建循环依赖关系。目标行已经依赖于当前行。

data.name: SimpleFinDecodeTokenInvalidError
data.value: The setup token is invalid. Please check the token and try again.

data.name: SimpleFinDecodeTokenRequestError
data.value: An error occurred while connecting to SimpleFIN. Please try again later.

data.name: InvalidOrganizationIDError
data.value: The provided organization ID is invalid.

data.name: SimpleFinAccountIDUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: The SimpleFIN account you are trying to update does not exist.

data.name: DuplicateOrganizationCreateError
data.value: An organization with this domain already exists.

data.name: SimpleFinOrganizationUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: The SimpleFIN organization you are trying to update does not exist.

data.name: SimpleFinOrganizationDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: The SimpleFIN organization you are trying to delete does not exist.

data.name: SyncSimpleFinOrganizationCreationError
data.value: Failed to create SimpleFIN organization for account {0}.

data.name: InvalidLinkedAccountIDError
data.value: The linked account ID you provided does not exist.

data.name: SimpleFinAccountNotFoundForSyncError
data.value: SimpleFIN account with SyncID '{0}' not found in cache. Skipping account sync.

data.name: SimpleFinMissingAccessTokenError
data.value: SimpleFIN access token is missing or empty.

data.name: SimpleFinDataRequestError
data.value: An error occurred while requesting SimpleFIN data.

data.name: AutoCategorizerTrainingNoTransactions
data.value: No transactions in the range selected to train the Auto-Categorizer.

data.name: AutoCategorizerNotTrained
data.value: Auto-Categorizer cannot be enabled before training.

data.name: LunchFlowApiKeyConfigurationError
data.value: Failed to configure LunchFlow API key. Status code: {0}

data.name: LunchFlowApiKeyMissingError
data.value: LunchFlow API key is not configured.

data.name: LunchFlowAccountDataRetrievalError
data.value: Failed to retrieve LunchFlow account data.

data.name: DuplicateLunchFlowAccountError
data.value: A LunchFlow account with this SyncID already exists.

data.name: LunchFlowAccountNotFoundError
data.value: The LunchFlow account you are trying to access does not exist.

data.name: LunchFlowTransactionDataRetrievalError
data.value: Failed to retrieve transaction data for LunchFlow account {0}.

data.name: LunchFlowLinkedAccountNotFoundForSyncError
data.value: Linked account not found for LunchFlow account {0}.

data.name: LunchFlowBalanceDataRetrievalError
data.value: Failed to retrieve balance data for LunchFlow account {0}.

data.name: InvalidAutoCategorizerMinimumProbabilityPercentageError
data.value: The auto-categorizer minimum probability must be between 0% and 100%.

data.name: InvalidDateFormatError
data.value: The provided date format is invalid.

data.name: TransactionBatchUpdateDuplicateIdsError
data.value: The batch update request contains duplicate transaction IDs.

data.name: TransactionBatchDeleteDuplicateIdsError
data.value: The batch delete request contains duplicate transaction IDs.

data.name: BalanceUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: The balance you are trying to update does not exist.

data.name: BalanceDuplicateDateError
data.value: A balance already exists for this account on that date.

data.name: ValueUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: The value you are trying to update does not exist.

data.name: ValueDuplicateDateError
data.value: A value for this date already exists for this asset.

data.name: SimpleFinAccountSyncException
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while syncing SimpleFIN account '{0}'.

data.name: LunchFlowAccountSyncException
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while syncing LunchFlow account '{0}'.

data.name: AccountTypeNotFoundError
data.value: The account type you are trying to access does not exist.

data.name: AccountTypeInvalidClassificationError
data.value: The provided account type classification is invalid. Valid values are 'asset' and 'liability'.

data.name: SimpleFin
data.value: SimpleFIN

data.name: LunchFlow
data.value: LunchFlow

data.name: AutomaticRuleInvalidAccountIdError
data.value: The account ID '{0}' is not a valid GUID.

data.name: AutomaticRuleUnsupportedOperatorForAccountError
data.value: Unsupported operator '{0}' for Account field.

data.name: AssetTypeCreateDuplicateNameError
data.value: An asset type with that name already exists.

data.name: AssetTypeCreateEmptyNameError
data.value: The asset type name cannot be empty.

data.name: AssetTypeCreateSameNameAsParentError
data.value: The asset type name cannot be the same as its parent.

data.name: AssetTypeCreateParentNotFoundError
data.value: The parent asset type does not exist.

data.name: AssetTypeUpdateNotFoundError
data.value: The asset type you are trying to update does not exist.

data.name: AssetTypeUpdateDuplicateNameError
data.value: An asset type with that name already exists.

data.name: AssetTypeUpdateEmptyNameError
data.value: The asset type name cannot be empty.

data.name: AssetTypeUpdateSameNameAsParentError
data.value: The asset type name cannot be the same as its parent.

data.name: AssetTypeUpdateParentNotFoundError
data.value: The parent asset type does not exist.

data.name: AssetTypeDeleteNotFoundError
data.value: The asset type you are trying to delete does not exist.

data.name: EnableBuiltInAssetTypesConflictError
data.value: Built-in asset types cannot be re-enabled because one or more custom asset types share a name with a built-in type. Please rename or remove the conflicting custom types first.

data.name: DisableBuiltInAssetTypesInUseError
data.value: Built-in asset types cannot be disabled because they are currently in use by existing assets or custom asset types.

data.name: InvalidAccountSourceError
data.value: The account source is invalid.

data.name: AccountPermanentDeleteNotDeletedError
data.value: The account must be deleted before it can be permanently deleted.

data.name: AccountTypeDuplicateNameError
data.value: An account type with this name already exists.

data.name: AccountTypeEmptyNameError
data.value: The account type name cannot be empty.

data.name: AccountTypeSameNameAsParentError
data.value: The account type name cannot be the same as its parent.

data.name: AccountTypeParentNotFoundError
data.value: The parent account type does not exist.

data.name: NoOidcLoginFound
data.value: 未找到此用户的 OIDC 登录信息。

data.name: RemoveOidcNoPassword
data.value: 无法移除 OIDC 登录。用户必须先设置本地密码以保持账户访问权限。

data.name: RemoveOidcFailed
data.value: 移除 OIDC 登录失败。
